login.heroSubtitle: Sign in to continue managing the learning platform.
login.heading: Account access
login.subheading: Use your staff credentials to continue.
login.error: Login failed. Please check your credentials.

register.heroSubtitle: Start curating the learning flow for students.
register.heading: New administrator
register.subheading: We will set the role to student by default.

password.title: Change password
password.subtitle: Enter your current password before setting a new one.
password.error: Could not change password. Please check your current password.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage instructors, students, and access state.
users.confirmDisable: Are you sure you want to disable this user?
users.confirmEnable: Are you sure you want to enable this user?
users.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

disable.title: Disable account?
disable.message: This account will not be able to sign in until it is enabled again.

enable.title: Enable account?
enable.message: This account will be able to sign in again if the credentials are valid.

delete.title: Delete account?
delete.message: This will delete the account from the system if the backend allows it. Make sure the account is no longer needed.

form.missingRequired: Please enter email, password, and full name.

exercises.title: Exercise Management
exercises.subtitle: Create, edit, and publish new ERD challenges.
exercises.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this exercise?

publish.title: Publish sample exercise?
publish.message: Students can see and work on this exercise after it is published.

unpublish.title: Unpublish sample exercise?
unpublish.message: Students will no longer see this exercise in the public exercise list. Existing submissions are not deleted.

delete.title: Delete exercise?
delete.message: This will delete the exercise from the system if the backend allows it. Make sure the exercise is no longer needed.

aiReview.pageSubtitle: Create an AI generation trial from a base exercise or prompt to review quality, without publishing the trial to students.
aiReview.title: Review AI-generated trial
aiReview.subtitle: Generate a trial from a sample exercise or prompt, preview it, then mark the base exercise eligible for student AI generation if the result is acceptable.

fields.baseAlreadyEligible: This base exercise is already eligible for AI generation via trial #{{trialId}}.
fields.baseNotEligible: This base exercise is not yet eligible for AI generation.

placeholders.customPrompt: Example: Create a database design exercise for a hotel booking system...
placeholders.businessContext: Describe business actors, workflow, and important rules...
placeholders.additionalRequirements: Constraints, learning goals, or specific points to emphasize...
placeholders.rejectReason: Add a reason if the exercise is not acceptable...

actions.trialCannotPublish: AI exercises are not published directly from this management view
actions.reviewInsteadOfEdit: Review AI trials from the detail page
actions.noReviewActions: No review action is needed for the current state.

messages.generated: AI trial created. Preview it before approving or rejecting.
messages.approved: AI trial approved; when linked to a base exercise, that base is now marked eligible for AI generation.

errors.inputRequired: Select a base exercise or enter prompt context before generating a trial.
errors.rejectReasonRequired: Enter a reject reason so the next regeneration has useful feedback.

empty.title: No preview yet
empty.body: Generate an AI trial to review title, description, and scenario data.

detail.creator: Creator
detail.publishGuard: This AI trial is only for reviewing generation quality and is not a public student exercise.
detail.approvedTrial: This AI trial is approved; the linked base exercise can be used as an AI generation source when present.

validation.createdByMissing: Unable to determine creator. Please sign in again.
validation.scenarioJson: Scenario data must be valid JSON.

noExercises.title: No exercises yet
noExercises.body: Create a sample exercise or generate an AI trial to review generation quality.

noAiDraft.title: No AI trial is waiting for review
noAiDraft.body: Use Check AI generation to create a trial, then preview, approve, or reject it.

noFilterResults.title: No matching exercises
noFilterResults.body: Try changing the source, review status, publish status, or search text.

sampleSolution.title: Sample solution
sampleSolution.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this sample solution?

delete.title: Delete sample solution?
delete.message: The sample solution will be removed from this exercise.

sampleSolution.notApplicable: AI-generated exercises do not have manually managed sample solutions.
sampleSolution.noSolution: No sample solution exists for this exercise.

validation.solutionJson: Sample solution must be valid JSON.

submissions.title: Submissions
submissions.subtitle: View student submission list and AI evaluation results.

detail.title: Submission Detail
detail.subtitle: Detailed info, diagram, and AI evaluation result.
detail.noEvaluation: No evaluation available for this submission.

roundHistory.title: Evaluation Round History
roundHistory.subtitle: Read-only metadata and saved feedback snapshots for this submission.
roundHistory.empty: No evaluation rounds have been recorded for this submission.
roundHistory.noDetails: This round has no saved feedback details.

evaluationRounds.title: Evaluation Round Monitoring
evaluationRounds.subtitle: Read-only view of round failures, provider metadata, and fallback usage.
evaluationRounds.empty: No evaluation rounds match the current filters.

practiceInsights.title: Practice Effectiveness
practiceInsights.subtitle: Read-only overview of submissions, grading rounds, providers, and common issues.
practiceInsights.empty: No data matches the current filters.
practiceInsights.recentRoundsHint: Latest grading rounds from the backend safe whitelist.

chartDescriptions.status: Grading flow health through the number of submissions in each status.
chartDescriptions.provider: AI provider stability through total grading rounds and fallback rounds.
chartDescriptions.score: Score buckets from real graded round scores in evaluation_rounds.overall_score.
chartDescriptions.trend: Daily trend by submitted date: submissions, graded rounds, and average score when available.
chartDescriptions.skillAnalytics: Skill groups inferred from error types stored in evaluation_rounds.details_snapshot.
chartDescriptions.issues: Common student issue types to prioritize exercise and guidance improvements.

emptyCharts.status: No submission status data is available for the current filters.
emptyCharts.provider: No provider or fallback data is available for the current filters.
emptyCharts.score: Not enough scored grading rounds for a score distribution yet.
emptyCharts.rounds: No grading round data is available for the current filters.
emptyCharts.trend: Not enough submitted or graded data for a trend yet.
emptyCharts.skillAnalytics: No grading issues are available for skill analytics yet.
emptyCharts.issues: No top issue type data is available for the current filters.

delete.title: Delete knowledge item?
delete.message: This knowledge item will be removed from the knowledge base if the backend allows it.

hide.title: Hide knowledge item?
hide.message: This knowledge item will no longer be used in the default visible list after it is hidden.

show.title: Show knowledge item?
show.message: This knowledge item will be visible again if it is approved and the backend allows it.

approve.title: Approve knowledge item?
approve.message: Approved knowledge can be used as reference material for the chatbot.

delete.title: Delete skill?
delete.message: This will delete the skill from the system if the backend allows it.

hide.title: Hide skill?
hide.message: The skill will no longer appear in lists that use active skills.

show.title: Show skill?
show.message: The skill will appear again in the appropriate lists.

chatbot.title: Knowledge QA chat
chatbot.subtitle: Ask database theory questions using approved KnowledgeBase material.
chatbot.emptyTitle: Ask about ERD, normalization, or keys
chatbot.emptyBody: The chatbot retrieves APPROVED knowledge and answers briefly from the matched context.
chatbot.placeholder: Type a question, for example: What is 1NF?
chatbot.loading: Retrieving knowledge and preparing an answer...
chatbot.archiveNote: Archived conversations are only hidden from history, not deleted.

archive.title: Archive conversation?
archive.message: This conversation will be hidden from the default history. Old messages are still kept.

restore.title: Restore conversation?
restore.message: This conversation will appear in the default history again.

chatbot.noSources: No sources yet. Send a question to see related materials.
chatbot.error: Could not send the question right now. Please check your session and try again.
chatbot.rateLimitError: You are sending questions too quickly. Please wait a minute and try again.

exerciseGenerator.title: Start practice
exerciseGenerator.subtitle: Choose or create an exercise before entering the database design workspace
exerciseGenerator.headerSubtitle: After an exercise is ready, use Start to open the ERD workspace.

ai.noteBody: The exercise is generated from approved KnowledgeBase material and published sample exercises.

manual.noteBody: Paste a free-form business context; the system will normalize it into a practice exercise.

placeholders.additionalRequirements: Example: include transaction history, status rules, reporting
placeholders.manualAdditionalRequirements: Example: emphasize date-based bookings, payment, and cancellation
placeholders.customPrompt: Example: Design a database for a hotel room booking management system...

empty.title: No exercise yet
empty.ai: Fill out the form and generate a new practice exercise.
empty.manual: Enter a free-form brief and create an exercise to start practicing.

errors.generate: Could not generate the exercise. Please try again.
errors.createDraft: Could not create a draft. Please try again.
errors.manualPromptRequired: Please enter an exercise brief or business context.

exerciseList.title: My AI exercises
exerciseList.subtitle: Private AI practice exercises you created from the generator.
exerciseList.empty: You have not created any AI exercises yet. Use Generate exercise to create a private practice exercise.
exerciseList.emptyArchived: No archived private AI exercises yet.

archive.title: Archive AI exercise?
archive.message: This private AI exercise will be hidden from the default list. Submissions created from it are still kept.

restore.title: Restore AI exercise?
restore.message: This AI exercise will appear in the default list again.

errors.archive: Could not archive this AI exercise.
errors.restore: Could not restore this AI exercise.

submissionHistory.title: Submission history
submissionHistory.subtitle: Review submitted work or continue editing when feedback rounds remain.

archive.title: Archive submission?
archive.message: This submission will be hidden from the default list. The work data and grading results are still kept.

restore.title: Restore submission?
restore.message: This submission will appear in the default list again.

errors.noRounds: No feedback rounds remain for this submission.

notices.draft: This submission is a draft. Open the workspace to continue working.
notices.canContinue: You still have a feedback round left, so you can continue editing and submit again.
notices.exhausted: All feedback rounds have been used. This submission is review-only.
notices.processing: This submission is being evaluated. Wait for the result before editing again.

evaluation.title: AI evaluation result
evaluation.help: Review the feedback here; when rounds remain, continue editing to submit the next round.
evaluation.empty: No evaluation result is available for this submission yet.

rounds.title: Feedback history
rounds.help: Open a round to review the saved status and hints.
rounds.noDetails: This round has no feedback details yet.

errors.noRounds: No feedback rounds remain for this submission.

workspacePage.title: Workspace: {{title}}
workspacePage.confirmSubmit: Are you sure you want to submit? After submission, the work is locked while the system evaluates it.
workspacePage.readOnly: This work has been submitted or is being evaluated. You can only review it while waiting for feedback.
workspacePage.revisionAvailable: Feedback is ready. Use Continue editing to reopen the workspace and submit round {{nextRound}}/{{max}}.

messages.submitSuccess: Submitted. The system is evaluating and will show results when ready.
messages.reopenSuccess: Workspace reopened. You can revise and submit the next round.

rounds.historyHelp: Open a round to review the saved hints.
rounds.noRoundDetails: This round has no feedback details yet.
rounds.exhausted: You have used all 3 feedback rounds. The workspace is now read-only.

evaluation.title: Evaluation result
evaluation.processing: The submission is being processed. Results will appear when the status is GRADED.
evaluation.processingWithPrevious: The current round is still being processed. The latest feedback below belongs to the most recent graded round.
evaluation.failed: Evaluation failed. Please try again later or contact your instructor if the problem continues.
evaluation.failedCanRevise: The current round failed to evaluate. You still have a round left, so use Continue editing to revise and submit the next round.
evaluation.failedNoRounds: The current round failed to evaluate and no feedback rounds remain.
evaluation.pollTimeout: Evaluation is taking longer than usual. Reload this page after a few minutes to check the result.
evaluation.noGradedFeedback: No successfully graded feedback is available for this submission yet.

workspace.locked: Submission is not in DRAFT status, so the workspace is read-only.
workspace.emptyCanvas: No diagramData yet. Add the first Entity or open the JSON tab to import valid diagramData.
workspace.canvasHelp: Drag nodes to reposition them. Drag from the right handle to the left handle to create a relationship. Double-click nodes or edges to edit.

notices.relationshipDuplicate: A relationship with the same name and entity pair already exists.
notices.relationshipExists: A relationship between these two entities already exists.

entity.name: Entity name
entity.bulkPlaceholder:
One attribute per line. Use * or (PK) to mark a primary key.
e.g. * studentId: BIGINT
fullName: VARCHAR

relationship.needsTwoEntities: At least 2 entities are required to create a relationship.
relationship.name: Relationship name

cardinalityHelp.1 - N: Left side one, right side many
cardinalityHelp.N - 1: Left side many, right side one
cardinalityHelp.N - N: Many-to-many, usually needs a bridge table

relationship.notePlaceholder: e.g. Needs a bridge table for N - N

submit.title: Submit knowledge item for review?
submit.message: This item will be sent to Admin for review. After submission, you cannot edit it until there is a review result.

delete.title: Delete knowledge draft?
delete.message: This knowledge draft will be removed from your list if the backend allows it.

practiceInsights.title: Insights
practiceInsights.subtitle: Anonymized overview of submissions, grading rounds, and common issues by exercise.
practiceInsights.selectorSubtitle: Choose an exercise to review signals for adjusting future assignments and guidance.
practiceInsights.exercisePlaceholder: Select an exercise to view insights
practiceInsights.emptyExercises: No exercises are available for insights yet.
practiceInsights.chooseExercise: Choose an exercise to view KPI cards, common issue charts, and anonymized submission rows.
practiceInsights.privacyNote: This page only uses aggregate/anonymized data; it does not show student names, student emails, raw diagrams, raw provider errors, or dead-letter payloads.

chartDescriptions.scope: Compare direct submissions with AI-derived exercise submissions to understand how the assignment is being used.
chartDescriptions.status: Current graded, failed, and processing submissions in the selected scope.
chartDescriptions.score: Score buckets from real graded round scores in evaluation_rounds.overall_score.
chartDescriptions.trend: Daily trend by submitted date within the selected exercise scope.
chartDescriptions.skillAnalytics: Skill groups inferred from details_snapshot errors, shown only as aggregate/anonymized signals.
chartDescriptions.issues: The most frequent student issue types for improving assignments or adding guidance.

emptyCharts.scope: No submission scope data is available for this exercise.
emptyCharts.status: No grading status data is available for this exercise.
emptyCharts.score: Not enough scored grading rounds for a score distribution yet.
emptyCharts.rounds: No grading round data is available for this exercise.
emptyCharts.trend: Not enough submitted or graded data for a trend yet.
emptyCharts.skillAnalytics: No grading issues are available for skill analytics yet.
emptyCharts.issues: No top issue type data is available for this exercise.

exerciseInsights.empty: No submissions are available in the current scope.
exerciseInsights.anonymizedHint: This table only shows submission IDs and aggregate status, without student names or emails.

filters.title: Insight filters
filters.subtitle: Filter by scope, grading round status, provider, and fallback usage.

scenario.invalid: Scenario data is not in a supported format. The technical data is still available below for inspection.

erd.invalid: The diagram data is not in a supported format, so it cannot be fully rendered. Please inspect the technical data below.
